title: Change Status When Hour Arrives?
excerpt:

posts.author: keshacrisp (Kesha)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hoping this already can be done, but if not, I’d love to see this!:
I’m a social media manager and am using Monday for my content planning up to the scheduling phase. Is it possible to have a status automatically change when my set hour arrives? For example, if I’ve scheduled a post to go live at 9am, once 9am passes I’d like for the status to change to “LIVE” automatically.

Thanks!

posts.author: TPL (James Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @keshacrisp Did you find a workaround for this?

I would like to set an automation up so ‘1 hour after date/ time arrives’ change status to ‘complete’. So far i have only been able to set up a blanket ‘when date arrives at 5pm’, but this is not quite as slick as i would like!
